precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'post'
    AND column_name = 'priority'
)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."post" ALTER COLUMN "priority" SET DEFAULT 'low'

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'post'
    AND column_name = 'priority'
    AND column_default IS NOT NULL
)
